description: Agent-usable verification surface for Assay. Agents drive the full loop via the CLI, POST /ingest (JSON Schema sdk_ingest.schema.json), or these MCP tools — NOT the browser SDK.

auth.note: All /mcp/* and /baselines* endpoints require a valid API key.

tools.name: run_verification
tools.description: Trigger a REAL visual-regression verification run against a target URL. Drives the Playwright runner, persists a result packet, and diffs against the URL's baseline when one exists. Returns the verification_id, outcome, packet_path, and diff.

project_key.description: Identifier for the project / store namespace (informational).

task_id.description: Grain TASK-#### this run verifies. Optional.

verification_id.description: Grain-issued VERIFY-XXXX-NNN ID. Generated if omitted.

no_docker.description: Run Playwright directly via Node instead of Docker.

threshold.description: Regression threshold as percent of changed pixels.

tools.name: code_review
tools.description: Run adversarial / multi-agent AI CODE REVIEW over a diff (NOT a URL). Drives the proposer/critic/judge runner, maps the verdict to a packet outcome (approved->pass, needs_fix->fail, inconclusive), persists a schema-valid packet, and returns {verdict, outcome, verification_id, status}. Provide a pre-gathered 'diff', or 'repo' + 'base'/'head' git refs.

base.description: Base git ref of the diff to review.

head.description: Head git ref of the diff to review.

diff.description: Pre-gathered unified diff text (alternative to base/head).

task_id.description: Grain TASK-#### this review verifies. Optional.

verification_id.description: Grain-issued VERIFY-XXXX-NNN ID. Generated if omitted.

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Fetch the structured report for a verification_id from the store: outcome, summary, diff stats, artifact paths, baseline/review status.

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Poll a verification_id for completion. Returns status=complete with the outcome once the packet is in the store, or status=pending if not found yet.

tools.name: list_runs
tools.description: List run summaries from the store, optionally filtered by task_id or outcome. Use this to enumerate every verification tied to a Grain task.

tools.name: list_baselines
tools.description: List every set baseline as {url, verification_id} pairs.

tools.name: approve_baseline
tools.description: Approve a packet: make it the baseline for its URL and mark review_status=approved. The agent's equivalent of the dashboard Approve button.

verification_id.description: The packet to approve as the new baseline.

tools.name: reject_baseline
tools.description: Reject a packet: mark review_status=rejected and keep the existing baseline.

tools.name: set_baseline
tools.description: Make a packet the baseline for its URL without recording a review verdict.

verification_id.description: The packet to set as baseline.

endpoints.description: Submit a captured screenshot payload. JSON Schema: sdk_ingest.schema.json.
Poll a verification by id; returns complete + outcome or not_found.
List the agent tools and their input schemas.
Invoke a tool by name with a JSON input object.
